title: SQBubliks: Survival
description: Survival, with lots of datapacks and beautiful graphics!
body:
![SQBubliks Survival](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e820138db6c0fc95bb6b108870106933fdbe5c0f.png)

## 🎮 Looking for the ultimate Minecraft experience with stunning graphics and tons of datapacks? You’ve come to the right place!

**SQBubliks: Survival is an elaborate modpack created for cool vanilla survival. Here you can enjoy unforgettable gameplay alone or with friends**

✨ Modpack Features:
- Optimized performance
- Enhanced graphics for maximum immersion

**Join our community and immerse yourself in the exciting world of SQBubliks: Survival! Explore new biomes, create unique items, chat with friends in voice chat and enjoy breathtaking graphics**.

Ready for adventure? Download this build and play! 🏰

**_❗IMPORTANT❗_**

The server for which this build was created is closed. We apologise to those who played. The world broke due to a large number of incompatible datapacks. Now all datapacks are installed as mods on the client and single game is available. List of datapacks of the past server below.



![Datapacks List](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0316407433d582650f2a397d21bbc39cbf420661.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Terralith
- BackPacks
- Amplified Nether
- Animated Doors
- BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack Terralith
- DnT Pillager Outpost Overhaul
- DnT Stronghold Overhaul
- Furnicraft
- Ships 
- Spawn Animations
- Stone Damage
- Tidal
- Tool Trims
- True Ending
- Upgraded Mobs
- Vanilla+ 
- Player Graves
- DinoBriks Rum
- Better End Cities (Vanilla)
- Players Drop Heads
- Info Tools
- Reg's More Foods
- Dungeons and Taverns Swamp Hut Overhaul
- Server Sleep
- Dungeons and Taverns Desert Temple Overhaul
- Random Bosses
- Transfer Pet Owner
- New Lodestone Recipe

</details>
